basic_info.description: 👋 I'm Umesh Lakhani. I'm a Full Stack Developer with 10+ years of experience in PHP, Laravel, CodeIgniter, React.js, React Native, Shopify, MySQL, and REST API development. I specialize in building scalable web applications, mobile apps, eCommerce solutions, and custom business software. I enjoy solving complex technical problems and delivering high-quality solutions for clients across multiple industries. 💜

projects.title: AI-Based Support Ticket Prioritization System
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered support ticket management system that automatically classifies tickets into High, Medium, and Low priority levels using Natural Language Processing (NLP). Integrated Hugging Face APIs to analyze ticket content and determine urgency, helping support teams improve response times and operational efficiency.

projects.title: OmniReturns – Return Management Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade return management platform developed for logistics operations. Streamlined return workflows, automated processing, improved operational efficiency, and enhanced user experience through optimized business processes and scalable architecture.

projects.title: OmniWMS – Warehouse Management System
projects.description: Developed a robust Warehouse Management System (WMS) for logistics operations, enabling inventory tracking, stock management, warehouse workflows, and operational reporting. Improved inventory accuracy and warehouse efficiency through process automation.

projects.title: OmniRPS – Returns Processing System
projects.description: Built a Returns Processing System (RPS) to optimize warehouse return operations through single-scan and depot-scan workflows. Implemented order tracking, processing history, and reporting features to increase operational visibility and efficiency.

projects.title: OmniCardPay – Payment Processing Platform
projects.description: Contributed to the development of OmniCardPay, a secure payment processing platform designed for logistics and cross-border commerce operations. Implemented payment workflows that enabled customers to seamlessly pay duties, taxes, and service charges online. Enhanced transaction security, improved payment processing efficiency, and integrated reliable payment gateways to ensure a smooth and user-friendly payment experience.

projects.title: Shopify Shipping Automation App
projects.description: Developed a custom Shopify shipping automation solution that streamlined shipping workflows, order fulfillment, shipment tracking, and logistics integrations. Improved efficiency by reducing manual shipping operations and automating order processing.

projects.title: Pets and Trends – Shopify Store
projects.description: Designed and developed a complete Shopify e-commerce store with product management, customer-friendly navigation, order processing, and responsive storefront design. Customized the platform according to client requirements and business goals.

projects.title: Event Management System
projects.description: Built a full-stack event booking and management platform using Node.js and React.js. The system supports event creation, attendee registration, scheduling, booking management, notifications, and administrative reporting.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer (Dedicated Developer)
technologies: React Native Mobile App Development using AI
